recent_bad_vcs_projects.name: aspose-zip
recent_bad_vcs_projects.summary: Aspose.Zip for Python via .NET is a library that can be used by Python developers for a variety of archive-processing tasks. It supports ZIP, GZIP, BZIP2, TAR, CPIO, LZIP, 7Z, LZMA, XZ and Z formats. It allows you to encrypt and decrypt files, create self-extracting archives and extract RAR, CAB, WIM formats as well. The API is easy to use and robust.
recent_bad_vcs_projects.author: Aspose

recent_bad_vcs_projects.name: evalassist

recent_bad_vcs_projects.author: Martín Santillán Cooper
